creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
mail.accountmanager.defaultaccount

was set to    account9    with my Google account _apparently_ the default. 

After deleting the preference then resetting the defaut to be my Google account, I found a different account number, and the option to generate a new key pair was no longer greyed out. 

Thanks to @blue_penquin:fairydust.space in Thunderbird Support in Matrix for talking me through the workaround.
